data.name: Lust Bound
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Red Reef, where sunlight, sand, and paradise are overshadowed by deception and intrigue.

Meet the locals. Reconnect with people from your past and get to know the newcomers who settled on the reef during your absence.

Work with your sexy, yet intimidating co-worker Naomi to gain the signatures needed for your resort.

Liaise with Summer, your childhood best friend-turned-sheriff to solve the murder you and your company are being accused of. OR you could work with Lilith to focus on the strange occult situation tied to the island's ancient past.

Connect with the local merchants, business owners and residents to convince them to sign on your resort.

Bond with other newcomers to the reef who are quite keen to get to know you.

And most important of all, dig deep with Evelyn and Julie, the most important women you left behind, to heal the wounds of the past.

And there's also this guy...

You can hang out with him too, or not...

However you decide to play, Lust Bound has you covered. Whether you want to play the romantic, looking for love with that special someone, a seductive playboy, wanting to indulge in ALL that the island has to offer... Lust Bound's stat system and branching narrative lets you craft the experience and characters YOUR way.

So get ready to embark on a story-rich, new adventure from the studio that brought you Lust Theory and Summer with Mia to see if you can navigate the drama, perils and intrigue waiting for you on Red Reef.

WARNING!

This game is for ADULTS only and it includes explicit, sexual content that some viewers may find offensive. The characters shown in the game are all over 18 years old.

data.short_description: Sun, Sand, Sex, Murder? When you return to your island paradise home to promote a new resort you expected an easy ride. What you got was anything but. Immerse yourself in a choice driven visual novel filled with intrigue, deception, an ancient legend, and, of course, Lust!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
